# Market Canvas AI

> Free, plain-English investing education + Sharia-compliant (halal) stock screening for the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) and US markets.

## Learn (beginner guides)
- [What Is a Stock (Share)? A Beginner's Guide](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-a-stock-share/)
- [How Does the Stock Market Work? (Beginner Guide)](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/how-does-the-stock-market-work/)
- [PSX vs US Stock Market: What's the Difference?](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/psx-vs-us-stock-market/)
- [What Is a Stock Index? KSE-100 &amp; KMI-30 Explained](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-a-stock-index-kse-100-kmi-30/)
- [Risk and Diversification in Investing Explained](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/risk-and-diversification-explained/)
- [How Do You Make Money From Stocks?](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/how-you-make-money-from-stocks/)
- [What Is Fundamental Analysis? Beginner's Guide](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-fundamental-analysis/)
- [What Is EPS (Earnings Per Share)? Simple Guide](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-eps-earnings-per-share/)
- [What Is a P/E Ratio (and What's a Good One)?](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-pe-ratio/)
- [What Is Market Capitalization (Market Cap)?](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-market-cap/)
- [What Is Technical Analysis? A Beginner's Guide](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-technical-analysis/)
- [How to Read a Stock Chart (Step by Step)](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/how-to-read-a-stock-chart/)
- [What Does Halal Investing Actually Mean?](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-halal-investing/)
- [What Makes a Stock Sharia-Compliant (Halal)?](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-makes-a-stock-halal/)
- [What Is a Dividend? (and How Dividend Yield Works)](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-a-dividend/)
- [What Is a Portfolio? Building Your First One](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-a-portfolio/)
- [Compound Interest: Why Long-Term Investing Wins](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/compound-interest-and-long-term-investing/)
- [What Is Dollar-Cost Averaging? A Beginner's Guide](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/dollar-cost-averaging-explained/)
- [How to Open a CDC / Brokerage Account in Pakistan](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/how-to-open-a-brokerage-account-in-pakistan/)
- [How Much Money Do I Need to Start Investing?](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/how-much-money-do-i-need-to-start-investing/)
- [Common Beginner Investing Mistakes to Avoid](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/common-beginner-investing-mistakes/)
- [What Is Return on Equity (ROE)? A Beginner's Guide](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-return-on-equity-roe/)
- [What Is the Debt-to-Equity Ratio? A Beginner's Guide](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-debt-to-equity-ratio/)
- [What Is Book Value? (and Price-to-Book Ratio)](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-book-value/)
- [Candlestick Charts Explained for Beginners](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-are-candlesticks/)
- [What Are Support and Resistance Levels? A Beginner Guide](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/support-and-resistance-explained/)
- [What Are Moving Averages? (SMA vs EMA Explained)](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-are-moving-averages/)
- [What Is the RSI Indicator? A Beginner's Guide](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/what-is-rsi-indicator/)
- [Is Day Trading Halal? An Islamic View for Beginners](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/is-day-trading-halal/)

## Halal stock screening
- [Halal stocks on the PSX (full KMI list)](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/halal-stocks-psx/)

## About
Sharia screening: AAOIFI / KMI All-Share. Markets: PSX + US. Educational, not financial advice.
